Resources

Useful things for small business owners.

Tools, links, and plain-language guides to help you run a tighter operation.

Tools & Links

Things we actually recommend.

Accounting

QuickBooks Online

The bookkeeping and payroll platform we use for client work. Small business plans start around $30/month.

quickbooks.intuit.com →
Scheduling

Calendly

Free appointment scheduling that syncs with your calendar and auto-generates Zoom links. What we use for consultations.

calendly.com →
Business Formation

Missouri Secretary of State

Official portal for registering an LLC or corporation in Missouri. You can file online for $50.

sos.mo.gov/business →
Tax

IRS Small Business Center

The IRS's own resources for small business owners — EIN applications, quarterly payment schedules, and more.

irs.gov →
Invoicing

Wave

Free invoicing and basic accounting software for very small businesses and freelancers. Good starting point before moving to QuickBooks.

waveapps.com →
Payroll

IRS Payroll Tax Guide

Plain-language overview of employer payroll tax obligations — what you're responsible for and when it's due.

irs.gov →
